meta.attribution: Product data attributed to Product Hunt.
meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: WorkBuddy
products.tagline: Produce sharpened results faster with a team of AI experts
products.summaryZh: 与AI专家团队协作，更快获得精准成果
products.descriptionZh: 腾讯工作助手是一款专为日常办公场景打造的AI智能体。提出需求，引导你的AI专家团队协作。引入第二意见，获得精炼且可直接应用的成果。
products.description: Tencent WorkBuddy is an AI agent built for everyday office work. Make a request. Guide your AI expert team. Bring in a second opinion. Get sharpened, ready-to-use results.

products.name: DocsAlot
products.tagline: Documentation that works for both humans and AI systems
products.summaryZh: 适用于人类与AI系统的文档
products.descriptionZh: DocsAlot将分散的帮助中心文章、知识库和开发者文档整合为人类与AI代理的单一事实来源。它包含托管MCP、llms.txt和skill.md。你的文档会出现在AI回答中，入职流程加速，代理不再读取过时的上下文。
products.description: DocsAlot turns scattered help center articles, knowledge base, and developer docs into one source of truth for humans and AI agents. It includes hosted MCP, llms.txt, and skill.md. Your docs show up in AI answers, onboarding gets faster, and agents stop reading stale context.

products.name: TryCase
products.tagline: Disposable test environments for AI coding agents
products.summaryZh: AI编码代理的一次性测试环境
products.descriptionZh: TryCase为AI编程代理提供可丢弃的Linux环境，用于运行应用、端到端测试变更、捕获截图与录制，并返回已验证的代码，无需你手动测试。
products.description: TryCase gives AI coding agents disposable Linux environments to run apps, test changes end to end, capture screenshots and recordings, and return verified code instead of asking you to test manually.

products.name: MentionDrop MCP
products.tagline: Give your AI agent live market signals
products.summaryZh: 为您的AI智能体提供实时市场信号
products.descriptionZh: MentionDrop MCP 将 Claude、Cursor、Windsurf 及其他支持 MCP 的智能体接入实时品牌监测。你的智能体可从限定高信号源（Reddit、Google News、搜索引擎、指定公开网页）中提取品牌提及、竞品讨论及公开客户痛点，进行分类整理并草拟回复供你审阅。提供 11 个工具、账户级 API 密钥，不会自动发布任何内容。询问“今天该关注什么？”即可获得可执行的答案。
products.description: MentionDrop MCP connects Claude, Cursor, Windsurf, and other MCP-aware agents to live brand monitoring. Your agent pulls brand mentions, competitor conversations, and public customer pain from bounded high-signal sources (Reddit, Google News, search, selected public web), triages them, and drafts replies for your review. 11 tools, account-scoped API keys, nothing auto-posted. Ask "what should I pay attention to today?" and get an answer you can act on.

products.name: CircleChat
products.tagline: Give your AI agents a slack, a task board, and a boss
products.summaryZh: 给你的AI代理一个Slack、一个任务面板，以及一个老板。
products.descriptionZh: CircleChat是一个由AI代理团队完成实际工作的工作空间。设定一个目标：团队将其分解为看板上的任务，认领工作，并在你可阅读的频道中汇报。每个交付物在任务关闭前都会经过LLM评审验证，因此你得到的是输出而非闲聊。在live.circlechat.co上可观看我们自己的代理公开工作。可免费自托管（MIT许可证），或由我们为你运行，每个工作空间每月29美元起。自带模型密钥。我们从不加价代币。
products.description: CircleChat is a workspace where a team of AI agents does real work. Set a goal: the team breaks it into tasks on a kanban board, claims the work, and reports in channels you can read. An LLM judge verifies every deliverable before a task can close, so you get output instead of chatter. Watch our own agents work in public at live.circlechat.co. Self-host free (MIT license), or we run it for you from $29/mo flat per workspace. Bring your own model keys. We never mark up tokens.

products.name: Claude Sonnet 5 Brand Report
products.tagline: What does Claude Sonnet 5 say about your brand?
products.summaryZh: Claude Sonnet 5 对你的品牌有何评价？
products.descriptionZh: 获取一份综合报告，了解Claude Sonnet 5基于其训练材料（知识截止日期为2026年1月）对你的品牌和竞争对手的评价。Claude Sonnet 5是Anthropic推出的全新模型，在Claude免费版和专业版计划中默认使用。
products.description: Get a comprehensive report about what Claude Sonnet 5 says about your brand and competitors based on its training material (knowledge cutoff Jan 2026). Claude Sonnet 5 is the brand new model by Anthropic that is used by default in Claude free and pro plans.

products.name: VoicePad AI
products.tagline: Offline voice dictation for Windows, Mac, iOS & Android
products.summaryZh: Windows、Mac、iOS 及 Android 离线语音听写
products.descriptionZh: VoicePad 可将您的语音转为文字，支持 Windows、Mac、iOS 和 Android 系统——完全离线运行。基于 Whisper AI 技术，全程在本地设备处理。Orb 悬浮球可覆盖所有应用：轻点、说话，文字即刻出现在光标所在位置。兼容 Gmail、Word、WhatsApp、IDE 等任意场景。无需订阅、无需云端、无需账户。前 1,000 名创始会员免费使用。由一位因双手沾满油污而无法打字的德国自行车修理工独立开发。
products.description: VoicePad turns your voice into text on Windows, Mac, iOS, and Android — 100% offline. Powered by Whisper AI, runs entirely on your device. The Orb floats over every app: tap, speak, text lands where your cursor is. Works in Gmail, Word, WhatsApp, your IDE — anywhere. No subscription. No cloud. No account. Free for the first 1,000 founding members. Built solo by a German bike mechanic who couldn't type with greasy hands.

products.name: NotientAI
products.tagline: AI social proof popups that adapt to every visitor
products.summaryZh: AI社交证明弹窗，适配每位访客
products.descriptionZh: AI社交证明弹窗，自动适配每位访客所在地。孟买访客看到“来自德里的Priya刚刚购买”，奥斯汀访客看到“来自德州的James刚刚注册”。同一组件，零手动操作。AI根据您的URL生成弹窗文案，名称自动适配访客所在地。支持转盘、优惠券、问答组件，提供分析及每周AI洞察。适用于任何网站，60秒完成设置，7天免费试用，每月9美元起。
products.description: AI social proof popups that adapt to every visitor's location automatically. Mumbai visitor sees "Priya from Delhi just purchased." Austin visitor sees "James from Texas just signed up." Same widget. Zero manual work. AI writes popup copy from your URL Names adapt to visitor location Spin wheel, coupons, quiz widgets Analytics and weekly AI insights Any website. 60 second setup. 7-day free trial from $9/mo.

products.name: tinypad
products.tagline: browser bookmarks, organized in a clean and sassy launchpad
products.summaryZh: 浏览器书签，以干净利落的启动台形式整理
products.descriptionZh: 浏览器书签在现代浏览器中始终像是二等公民。Tinypad 应运而生，为厌倦杂乱书签栏、无尽文件夹和无序网页工作流的人们，提供简洁现代的替代方案。无需再与浏览器用户体验的局限抗争，你将获得一个可定制的启动面板，专注于清晰、速度和日常易用性。Tinypad 是你所有书签的唯一真实来源：所有内容在浏览器间同步。不再丢失链接。
products.description: Browser bookmarks have always felt like second-class citizens inside modern browsers. Tinypad was created as a clean and modern alternative for people tired of cluttered bookmark bars, endless folders and disorganized web workflows. Instead of fighting browser UX limitations, you get a customizable launchpad focused on clarity, speed and everyday usability. Tinypad serves as a single source of truth for all of your bookmarks: everything is synced between browsers. No more lost links.

products.name: Serca
products.tagline: AI-powered workspace for creators to grow faster
products.summaryZh: 面向创作者的AI驱动工作空间，助力加速成长
products.descriptionZh: 别再在Notion/Google Docs写脚本、Miro画思维导图、ChatGPT要通用建议之间来回切换了——Serca将你的整个规划流程整合到一个高速工作空间。在一个地方集思广益、撰写脚本、整理钩子。此外，使用经过病毒式传播训练的Serca AI，编写或优化脚本、钩子、标题等，最大化观众留存率。专为追求增长、希望更快产出并持续扩展的创作者打造。
products.description: Stop bouncing between Notion/google docs for scripts, Miro for mind maps, and chat GPT for generic suggestions Serca brings your entire planning process into a single, high-speed workspace. Brainstorm ideas, write scripts, and organise hooks in one place. Plus, use Serca AI, trained on virality, to write or optimise your scripts, hooks, titles, etc for maximum viewer retention. Built specifically for growth-focused creators who want to produce faster and scale consistently.

products.name: Codeswtch
products.tagline: Engineering judgment for AI-built software
products.summaryZh: 对AI构建的软件进行工程判断
products.descriptionZh: 面向AI创业者的现代工程订阅服务。无需雇佣员工、管理自由职业者或寄望AI自行完成——只需订阅，即可随时获取资深工程师的指导。单一订阅，无限次请求。
products.description: A modern engineering subscription for founders building with AI. Instead of hiring employees, managing freelancers, or hoping AI gets it right... Subscribe to experienced engineering guidance whenever you need it. One subscription. Unlimited requests.

products.name: Proofling
products.tagline: The AI agent that collects testimonials while you sleep
products.summaryZh: 在您睡眠时收集用户评价的AI代理
products.descriptionZh: 在你睡觉时自动收集用户评价的AI助手。Proofling连接Stripe后，自动向每位付费客户发送一次温和询问和一次友好提醒，无需反复催促。回复自带授权声明，并附有与真实支付关联的已验证买家徽章。你只需筛选保留内容，评价墙便会自动生成：支持托管、嵌入，或导出为proof.json格式用于网站、邮件及AI代理。这是买家真正信赖的诚实证明——专为厌恶主动索要评价的创始人打造。
products.description: The AI agent that collects testimonials while you sleep. Proofling connects to Stripe and asks every paying customer automatically - one warm ask, one gentle nudge, no chasing. Replies come back with consent attached and a verified-buyer badge tied to a real payment. You approve the keepers, and your Wall of Proof fills itself: hosted, embeddable, and exportable as proof.json for your site, emails, or AI agents. Honest proof buyers actually believe - built for founders who hate asking.

products.name: Magnut AI
products.tagline: AI Powered Social Media Automation Platform
products.summaryZh: AI驱动的社交媒体自动化平台
products.descriptionZh: Magnut AI帮助营销人员、代理机构、自由职业者和企业在几分钟内创建专业营销内容。生成AI图像、广告创意、产品样机、社交媒体帖子和视频，同时保持每个设计符合品牌规范。构建可复用的品牌档案、使用现成模板并自动化创意工作流程，这一切都通过一个AI驱动的平台完成。
products.description: Magnut AI helps marketers, agencies, freelancers, and businesses create professional marketing content in minutes. Generate AI images, ad creatives, product mockups, social media posts, and videos while keeping every design on-brand. Build reusable brand profiles, use ready-made templates, and automate creative workflows, all from one AI-powered platform.

products.name: Profit Bid
products.tagline: Bid on profit, not revenue — POAS for ecommerce ads
products.summaryZh: 为利润出价，而非收入——电商广告的POAS策略
products.descriptionZh: Profit Bid 将电商店铺接入 Google Ads、Meta 等平台，以实际利润（POAS）而非收入为优化目标。追踪扣除销货成本、费用及增值税后的利润率。上传利润加权转化数据，同步 A/C/X 产品标签，自动化竞价与预算管理，并通过 AI Agent Proby 扩展优势产品。支持 WooCommerce、Shopify 及 4 个平台。14 天免费试用，月费 14.99 美元起。
products.description: Profit Bid connects ecommerce stores to Google Ads, Meta & more — optimizing for real profit (POAS), not revenue. Track margin after COGS, fees & VAT. Upload profit-weighted conversions, sync A/C/X product labels, automate bids & budgets, and scale winners with AI Agent Proby. WooCommerce, Shopify & 4 platforms. 14-day free trial from $14.99/mo.

products.name: Profit Router
products.tagline: Seven AIs in. One money move you'd ship tonight.
products.summaryZh: 七重AI加持。今晚即可上线的资金管理方案。
products.descriptionZh: Profit Router 将你的资金问题输入 OpenAI、Claude、Grok、Gemini、Qwen、GLM 和 DeepSeek，然后提炼出一个你今晚就能直接使用的综合答案（报价、价格、邮件、钩子）。免费演示：ai.fivetoclose.cloud。
products.description: Profit Router runs your money question through OpenAI, Claude, Grok, │ Gemini, Qwen, GLM & DeepSeek — then distills one composite answer │ you'd actually paste tonight (offer, price, email, hook). Free demo at │ ai.fivetoclose.cloud.

products.name: StaffEngineer
products.tagline: Deterministic Claude Code skills for a production stack
products.summaryZh: 确定性 Claude Code 技能：面向生产栈
products.descriptionZh: StaffEngineer 是一套确定性的 Claude Code 技能包，每次都能以相同正确的方式搭建并连接生产级开发栈，无需每次会话都重新提示 Claude。这些技能在已知工具链（OrbStack、Doppler、Docker）上运行确定性脚本（例如用于 CI 的 /squidci）。今日免费提供：squidapp（全栈脚手架）和 squidops（工具链诊断）。完整技能包（部署、可观测性、实时、持久化工作流）为一次性购买，永久拥有，无需订阅。
products.description: StaffEngineer is a pack of deterministic Claude Code skills that scaffold and wire a production-grade dev stack the same correct way every time — instead of re-prompting Claude each session. Skills run deterministic scripts (e.g. /squidci for CI) over a known toolchain (OrbStack, Doppler, Docker). Free today: squidapp (full-stack scaffold) and squidops (toolchain doctor). The full pack (deploy, observability, real-time, durable workflows) is a one-time purchase you own, not a subscription.

products.name: AI Brand Kits
products.tagline: Download free design.md files and more to launch your site
products.summaryZh: 下载免费的 design.md 文件及更多资源，快速搭建你的网站
products.descriptionZh: 粘贴URL或选择调色板。为Cursor、Claude和v0导出DESIGN.md。
products.description: Paste a URL or pick a palette. Export DESIGN.md for Cursor, Claude, and v0.

products.name: Endl
products.tagline: A global operating account for fiat, stablecoins, and cards.
products.summaryZh: 一个支持法币、稳定币和银行卡的全球运营账户。
products.descriptionZh: Endl 是无国界企业的全球运营账户。支持收款、以法币或稳定币持有资金、向160多个国家的承包商付款，以及使用企业卡消费。所有功能均整合于一个专为快速合规的全球业务运营而设计的账户中。
products.description: Endl is the global operating account for borderless businesses. Collect payments, hold funds in fiat or stablecoins, pay contractors in 160+ countries, and spend with corporate cards. All from one account built for fast, compliant global business operations.

products.name: Pennen
products.tagline: One quiet handwritten page a day. No feed, no AI.
products.summaryZh: 每天一页安静的手写。无信息流，无AI。
products.descriptionZh: Pennen 是一款为 iPad 和 Apple Pencil 设计的、以手写为优先的宁静私密日记应用。每天一页带日期的页面，使用真实墨水书写：过去的页面会封存并变为只读，表情贴纸可撕下按压粘贴，连续记录也有宽容——哪怕只写一行也算数。你的页面仅存于 iPad 和你的 iCloud 中：无账户、无广告、无分析、无 AI 读取任何文字。定价如笔记本——年度订阅含 7 天免费试用，或一次性终身购买，价格低于一本 Moleskine。
products.description: Pennen is a calm, private, handwriting-first daily journal for iPad and Apple Pencil. One dated page per day, in real ink: past pages seal and become read-only, emoji stickers peel and press on, and the streak forgives — a one-line night still counts. Your pages live only on your iPad and in your own iCloud: no accounts, no ads, no analytics, no AI reading a word. Priced like a notebook — yearly with a 7-day free trial, or a one-time lifetime that costs less than a Moleskine.

products.name: Toku Reader
products.tagline: Read & listen to native Japanese and Chinese, tap any word
products.summaryZh: 阅读并聆听地道的日语和中文，点击任意单词
products.descriptionZh: Toku 将日语和中文原生内容——文章、小说、播客、YouTube 视频——转化为你真正能读懂的形态。点击任意单词即可查看读音、释义和词典，无需离开当前页面。音频和视频内容配有同步可点击字幕：点击学习、放慢速度、重播某句，或每句后自动暂停以便跟读。它内置离线词典，在设备本地运行自有日/中引擎——快速、私密、无需账户、无打卡机制。唯有阅读。
products.description: Toku turns native Japanese and Chinese — articles, novels, podcasts, and YouTube videos — into something you can actually read. Tap any word for its reading, meaning, and dictionary, without leaving the page. On audio and video you get a synced, word-tappable transcript: tap to learn, slow it down, replay a line, or pause after each sentence to shadow it back. It runs its own JP/CN engine on-device with offline dictionaries — fast, private, no accounts, no streaks. Just reading.
